extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE won the stage 18 seconds faster than CONTADOR on the ITT finishing climb to Mombru, taking yellow jersey
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE gained 26 seconds on CONTADOR at intermediate checkpoint before finish climb, indicating early pacing aggression paid off
GILBERT finished 53 seconds down on CONTADOR but retained GC position, revealing shallow time gaps in overall standings

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Beat prime Contador by 18 seconds on uphill ITT despite claiming cautious pre-race mindset, masking true form
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Lost 18 seconds to young puncheur on uphill finish suggests declining power-to-weight against explosive riders
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: neutral: Large time loss to Contador on climb but maintained GC position shows tight overall classification
